item.title: Conversations About AI: Policing, Privacy, and the Future We’re Ignoring
item.description: From helping detectives solve cold cases to personal assistants analyzing our daily routines, AI holds enormous potential but only if we rethink our approach to technology, privacy, and responsibility. This isn’t just about efficiency. It’s about preparing society for a profound shift in how we live, work, and protect ourselves in an AI-driven world.
